news.title: Meta debuts the Muse Spark model in a ‘ground-up overhaul’ of its AI
news.summary: This is the first model Meta has released under its Superintelligence Labs, led by former ScaleAI CEO Alexandr Wang.

news.title: Hack-for-hire group caught targeting Android devices and iCloud backups
news.summary: Security researchers exposed a spying campaign by a hack-for-hire group that used Android spyware and phishing to steal iCloud credentials and hack victims’ devices.

news.title: Tubi is the first streamer to launch a native app within ChatGPT
news.summary: Tubi becomes the first streaming service to offer an app integration within ChatGPT, the AI chatbot that millions of users turn to for answers.

news.title: Volkswagen begins testing its self-driving microbuses in Los Angeles ahead of launch with Uber
news.summary: Volkswagen subsidiary MOIA America still has a long and winding regulatory road before it can launch a commercial robotaxi service.

news.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
news.summary: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

news.title: The Neo Effect: How Apple’s cheapest Mac is changing the PC game
news.summary: The MacBook Neo is disrupting the laptop space and putting Apple into the conversation as a value option like it’s never been before. news.title: Microsoft’s executive shake-up continues as developer division chief resigns
news.summary: Microsoft is losing another veteran executive. Julia Liuson, head of Microsoft's developer division (DevDiv), is resigning from the software giant after 34 years. news.title: Motorola's budget phones are now up to 50% more expensive as memory shortage drags on
news.summary: Motorola's budget phones are much less budget-friendly today.

news.title: To beat Altman in court, Musk offers to give all damages to OpenAI nonprofit
news.summary: Musk won’t seek a “single dollar” in OpenAI suit after asking to pocket up to $134 billion.

news.title: Tankers passing through Strait of Hormuz will have to pay cryptocurrency toll
news.summary: Any tanker passing must reveal its cargo so Iran can determine transit fee amount.

news.title: Steam client files point to "framerate estimator" feature in the works
news.summary: JSON text strings suggest performance charts based on "framerates of other Steam users."

news.title: For the first time ever, Amazon is cutting old Kindles off from the Kindle Store
news.summary: Post-2013 Kindles will continue to work, even if they no longer receive updates.

news.title: Meta's New AI Model Gives Mark Zuckerberg a Seat at the Big Kid's Table
news.summary: Muse Spark is Meta’s first model since its AI reboot, and the benchmarks suggest formidable performance.

news.title: ‘We Were Not Ready for This’: Lebanon's Emergency System Is Hanging by a Thread
news.summary: In Lebanon, nearly 1 in 5 people has been displaced by Israeli attacks, leaving the government to manage a modern crisis without modern digital infrastructure.

news.title: The US Army Is Building Its Own Chatbot for Combat
news.summary: The AI system, trained on real military data, is meant to give soldiers mission-critical information.

news.title: Apple’s Fanciest Watch Is $100 Off
news.summary: This discount brings the price of the Apple Watch Ultra 3 with GPS and cellular down to just $700.

news.title: 5 Burning Questions About Elon Musk’s Terafab Chip Partnership with Intel
news.summary: Intel’s role in Elon Musk’s ambitious chip venture is still murky, raising questions about what the partnership actually entails—and whether it can work at all.
